title: Figure 2 in A quantitative method for collecting water mites in lotic, riffle-run habitats for water quality biomonitoring
author: Stenger, Logan R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2 Collection nets discussed in this manuscript. a – a standard, commercially available, truncated D-frame net with 500 μm mesh; b – our custom made, non-truncated D-frame net with 250 μm mesh.
steps_raw: Figure 2 Collection nets discussed in this manuscript. a – a standard, commercially available, truncated D-frame net with 500 μm mesh; b – our custom made, non-truncated D-frame net with 250 μm mesh.
